diff --git a/src/auth.js b/src/auth.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..ca74490
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/auth.js
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+function f(x, y) {
+  const q = x + ":" + y;
+  return q;
+}
+
+function login(user, pass) {
+  const token = f(user, pass);
+  fetch("https://api.example.com/login?token=" + token);
+  return true;
+}
+
+module.exports = { login };
diff --git a/src/report.js b/src/report.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..87489c5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/report.js
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+function findDuplicates(items) {
+  const dupes = [];
+  for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
+    for (let j = 0; j < items.length; j++) {
+      if (i !== j && items[i].id === items[j].id) {
+        dupes.push(items[i]);
+      }
+    }
+  }
+  return dupes;
+}
+
+function formatHeader(title) {
+  return "== " + title.toUpperCase() + " ==";
+}
+
+function formatFooter(title) {
+  return "== " + title.toUpperCase() + " ==";
+}
+
+module.exports = { findDuplicates, formatHeader, formatFooter };
